task_completion.description: Navigate to the Review of Systems (ROS) template management or creation screen in NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem interface should be visible, specifically displaying a section or modal for managing or adding 'Review of Systems' or 'ROS' templates.
A text input field for the template name should contain exactly 'Cardio_Consult'.
The symptom 'Fatigue' should be visible as a selected item, checked box, or entered text under the 'General' or 'Constitutional' category of the ROS template.

task_completion.description: Include 'Chest pain', 'Palpitations', and 'Edema' in the Cardiovascular section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The symptoms 'Chest pain', 'Palpitations', and 'Edema' should be visible as selected items, checked boxes, or entered text under the 'Cardiovascular' category of the ROS template.

task_completion.description: Include 'Shortness of breath' (or acceptable synonym) in the Respiratory section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The symptom 'Shortness of breath', 'Dyspnea', or 'SOB' should be visible as a selected item, checked box, or entered text under the 'Respiratory' category of the ROS template.

task_completion.description: Save the template and verify it is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification indicating the template was saved, or the 'Cardio_Consult' template appearing in the saved list/table of available ROS templates.

integrity.description: The agent used the NOSH ChartingSystem web GUI to create the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, not terminal windows executing API/curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual NOSH application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine NOSH ChartingSystem EHR, not a text editor, notes app, or a locally mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent entered the symptoms into the actual template configuration fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Symptoms should be entered into the specific ROS category fields or checkboxes, not just typed into a general search bar or a single unstructured text block if the system provides categorized inputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Template Name: 'Cardio_Consult'. Required Symptoms: Fatigue (General/Constitutional); Chest pain, Palpitations, Edema (Cardiovascular); Shortness of breath OR Dyspnea OR SOB (Respiratory). 'Dyspnea' and 'SOB' are verified and acceptable medical synonyms for Shortness of breath.
